parsed.name: cubrid-mysql-select-by-pk
parsed.description: Single-row SELECT by primary key from a 1K-row table. Measures point-query latency for CUBRID (pycubrid) vs MySQL (PyMySQL). Replicates cubrid-benchmark Tier 1: bench_select_10k_by_pk.

queries: CREATE TABLE bench_select_pk (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, amount INT NOT NULL)

steps.name: select-by-pk
steps.query: SELECT id, name, amount FROM bench_select_pk WHERE id = %(id)s
